title: oxyanthera decurva
intro: Oxyanthera decurva, also known as the Burmese boxwood or Indian boxwood, is a plant species native to South Asia, particularly in India and Southeast Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oxyanthera decurva include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and providing relief from pain and inflammation. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and ointments, which are applied topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
